description: Update your style quotient with ease with this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit.Height: 19 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 14 cmMade of tough polyester for durabilityTwo short handlesHas one main zippered compartment with a pouch and a zippered pocketOne zippered compartment at the back for additional spaceOne zippered pocket on the front with the brand badgeTwo small zippered pockets on the sidesOne detachable, adjustable shoulder strapCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
